name: CustomLFS
_comment1: version is frozen at 0.2.1 to maintain compatibility for old meshcore builds
_comment2: which were pinned incorrectly, causing any version bump to break them
_comment3: pinning to CustomLFS **MUST** be done using #gittag or #gitsha, not @version
description: A wrapper for Adafruit_LittleFS on nRF52. Supports custom regions of nRF52 on-chip flash and external SPI flash memory.
